name: Verify Architecture Boundaries
description: Before writing to UI component files, remind the agent to check clean architecture boundaries. UI components must not import provider SDKs or LLM clients.

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify: 1) If this is a UI component (under components/ or features/*/components/), it must NOT import from lib/providers/*, features/ai/clients/*, or any provider SDK (googleapis, @microsoft/microsoft-graph-client, imapflow, nodemailer, telegram). 2) If this is a server file, it must use 'import server-only'. 3) No tokens or API keys in NEXT_PUBLIC_* variables. If the write violates these rules, refuse and explain why.
